features: SMOOTH AND GENTLE DOUBLE FOIL: Experience a smooth and gentle shave with the double foil shaver designed to contour to the body's curves, ensuring close contact with the skin for a precise, comfortable and painless hair removal.
HYPOALLERGENIC RUBBER STRIP: This shaver features a hypoallergenic rubber strip that helps in softly stretching the skin and raising the hair, providing a smoother and more accurate shave.

WET OR DRY: Versatile for both wet and dry use, offering a smooth and convenient shaving experience anytime, anywhere. The shaver comes with ergonomic shaped handle for full control and anti-slip grip for optimal use during bath or shower.

BIKINI ATTACHMENT AND ACCESSORIES: This shaver comes with a bikini attachment, cleaning brush, USB cable and drawstring storage pouch providing a complete all-in-one grooming solution for a smooth and precise shave.

CORDLESS AND RECHARGEABLE: This cordless shaver is rechargeable via any USB power source, fully charged in about 90 minutes for 60 minutes of convenient cordless use. With quick charging, just 10 minutes gives you enough power for a single shave.
description: Product Description The Paul Anthony Cordless Lady Shaver features an integrated flexible trimmer that trims the finest hairs - even those stray ones that can sometimes escape - before smoothly producing a soft and polished finish. The intercept trimmer has a rubber strip gently stretches the skin whilst lifting the hairs for a more precise shave. The two hypoallergenic floating foils comfortably follow the body?s contours so even hard to reach places can be tackled gently and effectively, which enhances the ease and convenience of the shaver. This particular technique also protects the body from any potential nicks and cuts. The Cordless Lady Shaver is shower-proof, meaning that it can be effectively used wet or dry and is also ergonomically designed with anti-slip grip which means you can use it in the bath or shower with confidence. And don?t worry about it running out of power halfway through because once it is charged it gives 60 minutes cordless usage time. The Paul Anthony cordless lady shaver comes with a handy bikini attachment so you can gently and precisely trim intimate areas with no struggle. A cleaning brush also comes with the shaver, which is ideal for maintaining the shaver?s performance, by ensuring no hairs are clogging the foils or intercept trimmer up, as well as keeping it clean and hygienic. Once you have finished using the shaver and cleaned it, pop it back in the beauty bag provided, Pack contains: 1x Paul Anthony Lady Shaver 1x Bikini Attachment 1x Cleaning Brush 1x Drawstring Beauty Bag 1x USB Cable NOTE: USB Power Source required. Safety Warning Avoid using the shaver while charging. Be cautious when using the intercept trimmer to prevent skin irritation. Clean the shaver regularly to prevent bacterial growth.
